message:
feat(web): Side-by-side sequence and 3D viewers on wide screens

On screens 1600px+ wide, the sequence viewer and 3D structure viewer
now display side-by-side instead of stacked, making much better use
of horizontal space on large monitors.

Layout breakpoints:
- 1600px+: Side-by-side with 400px height each
- 2200px+: Larger 500px height for both viewers
- Below 1600px: Traditional stacked layout

New CSS classes:
- .detail-viewers: Flex container for viewer panels
- .viewer-panel: Individual viewer wrapper

This completes the responsive layout improvements for desktop/4K screens.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
